title: Zombie Apocalypse: Reborn
description: A zombie apocalypse pack with immersive experience and great optimization.
body:
## YOU NEED TO CHANGE MODS' CONFIGS TO EXPERIENCE THE 100 DAYS ZOMBIE APOCALYPSE

## Features

**Landscape Overhaul :**
Adds various different and charming biomes to game. There is beautiful grass fields,grand forests, and much more interesting things waiting for you! Feel free to explore with zombies following you, forever.

**Survival Improvements:**
Thirst burns, and hypothermia cripples. Pray for not freezing to death at night, or get a sunstroke while exploring.

**Zombie Enchancement:**
With Zombie Awareness, make zombies more intelligent and threatening! Be careful, they will always hunt for you.

**Optimized Performance:**

- **CensoredASM** greatly improves entity performance.

- **Entity/Particle Culling** reduce render pressure.

- **Vintage Fix** greatly decrease memory use.

## Performance 

Tested on the exact same settings and the same seed.

|                           | Zombie Apocalypse: Reborn | Mustard Virus by Forge Labs |
|---------------------------|---------------------------|-----------------------------|
|             FPS           | 350           |      235   |

**…And much more for you to discover!**

Warning: Made by a sleep-deprived newbie. Balance? Doubtful. Bugs? Guaranteed. But your feedback will shape this apocalypse!
